### 2141156
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E48 - The Last Laugh**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔒 11:02  
⌛ October 14, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=1000000000093702&titleid=2141156&mediaid=ffaf6a76cf891915f90857e784957740e3167d84) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/the-last-laugh-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141156` mediaid=`ffaf6a76cf891915f90857e784957740e3167d84`  
_Disappointed when his friends don't laugh at his jokes, Funshine encounters the Laffinpuff, a magical comedian who grants Funshine's wish to make everyone think he's funny. But Funshine realizes it's no fun being funny when people laugh at everything he says, whether he means it to be funny or not. To get the wish rescinded, he must face the Laffinpuff in a grueling ordeal of slapstick humor._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141156_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
